subject: Open GATE Guidance Session
body:
Hi Aspirant,We’re hosting an Open GATE Guidance + AMA Session  with our GATE mentors.  📅 Date: Today, 13th Feb ⏰ Time: 6:00 PMThis session is for students who:
Need clarity on GATE preparation strategy.
Want to understand our batch structure
Have questions about admissions
Want to interact directly with mentors
If you’re confused, stuck or still deciding: this session is for you.Don’t miss this opportunity to get your doubts resolved directly from the mentors.Please join 5–10 minutes before the session begins.
Join the zoom session now
Write to us: feedback@geeksforgeeks.org
I'm at peace with others moving ahead, so I'll
label: Marketing
